decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The key strategy is to establish early board presence with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, while using lightning bolt and stubborn denial to control the opponent's threats. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding help to boost the power of the deck's creatures and protect them from removal spells. Kroxa, Titan of Death's Hunger adds disruption to the opponent's hand, while Scion of Draco provides a powerful late-game threat. Overall, the deck aims to win the game quickly through aggressive creature beats and efficient removal.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and using burn spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. It also includes disruptive cards like Mana Tithe and Ranger-Captain of Eos to control the opponent's board. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional threats and card advantage. The deck also utilizes cards like Blood Moon and Goblin Bombardment to disrupt the opponent's mana base and removal spells. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and burn spells while maintaining a level of control.

The deck focuses on using a combination of creatures and spells to generate a large amount of mana and overwhelm the opponent with powerful Eldrazi creatures. By utilizing cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to ramp up mana production, as well as cards like Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to cheat out big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths, the deck aims to quickly establish a dominant board presence and finish off the opponent before they can mount a defense.

The focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, discard spells, and removal. It aims to control the board and tempo of the game, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters to apply pressure and close out the game. The deck's key strength lies in its ability to outmaneuver opponents by denying them resources and preventing them from developing their board state, ultimately leading to victory through attrition and strategic plays.

This deck focuses on utilizing mill cards like Hedron Crab, Ruin Crab, and Fractured Sanity to quickly eliminate the opponent's library. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by milling key cards and finishing them off with cards like Archive Trap and Tasha's Hideous Laughter. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Fatal Push and Drown in the Loch to control the board and protect the mill strategy. Surgical Extraction is included to remove crucial cards from the opponent's graveyard, while Visions of Beyond provides card draw to keep the deck moving smoothly.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with cards like Faithful Mending and Ephemerate, then using Goryo's Vengeance to bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand for a powerful combo finish. Cards like Psychic Frog and Solitude provide additional control and removal, while Force of Negation helps protect your combo pieces. The mana base is designed to support the different color requirements of the deck, allowing for smooth casting of spells. The overall goal is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly putting powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand into play from the graveyard using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also includes disruption like Thoughtseize and Solitude to control the game while setting up the combo. The deck utilizes instant-speed reanimation to surprise opponents and overwhelm them with threats that are difficult to deal with. The lands and spells are also carefully chosen to support the combo strategy and provide flexibility in different situations.

This deck focuses on assembling pieces to achieve a powerful combo using cards like Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Emrakul, the Promised End. It aims to control the board with removal spells like Unholy Heat and Malevolent Rumble while disrupting the opponent's game plan with Thought-Knot Seer and Haywire Mite. The deck also utilizes powerful lands like Urza's Saga and Eldrazi Temple to ramp up and generate value. The key strategy revolves around building a board state that overwhelms the opponent and secures victory through a devastating combo.

This deck focuses on using ramp spells and Eldrazi creatures to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats. By ramping into big creatures like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger and Emrakul, the Promised End quickly, the deck aims to dominate the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes removal spells and support cards like Fight Rigging and Disciple of Freyalise to help maintain control and protect its threats. With a combination of ramp, control, and powerful Eldrazi creatures, this deck aims to overpower the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana to play powerful Eldrazi creatures while controlling the opponent's board with spells like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command. It also utilizes cards like Disciple of Freyalise and Green Sun's Zenith to further accelerate its mana production. The Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, Ulamog, and Drowner of Truth provide a powerful win condition, while cards like Fight Rigging and Fanatic of Rhonas help keep the opponent's threats in check. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures and efficient control spells.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain aggressive pressure on the opponent while utilizing blink effects to generate additional value from triggered abilities. By combining creatures with powerful effects like Teferi, Time Raveler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with cards like Ephemerate and Heartless Summoning, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent while simultaneously building a strong board presence. The inclusion of removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize helps to control the opponent's resources, allowing the deck to maintain its tempo and overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards to quickly assemble a powerful combo that can disrupt and overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Spoils of the Vault and Pact of Negation to search for key pieces, and utilizing Thud to deal massive damage, the deck aims to quickly finish off the opponent before they have a chance to respond. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Inquisition of Kozilek to control the opponent's resources and protect its own combo.

The deck focuses on using instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Solitude to quickly bring powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand onto the battlefield. It also utilizes cards like Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler to control the opponent's hand and disrupt their strategy. With a mix of graveyard manipulation, card draw, and removal spells, this deck aims to quickly set up powerful combos and overwhelm the opponent with its instant reanimation tactics.

The deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with key creatures like Griselbrand, then use cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Quantum Riddler to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo finish. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Solitude and Thoughtseize to protect the combo. Ephemerate helps to re-trigger enter-the-battlefield effects, while Faithful Mending helps with card draw and graveyard filling. The manabase is designed to support the deck's diverse color requirements and includes some utility lands like Prismatic Ending and Meticulous Archive.

The deck aims to cycle through cards quickly using cheap, powerful creatures like Street Wraith and Waker of Waves. It also utilizes the Cascade mechanic with cards like Shardless Agent and Violent Outburst to cheat out expensive creatures like Oliphaunt and Colossal Skyturtle. The key goal is to fill up the graveyard with creatures and then cast Living End to return them all to the battlefield, creating a massive board presence in a single turn. Endurance and Subtlety help protect the combo while Force of Negation provides additional disruption.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. Using cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to apply early pressure, while also utilizing Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for additional reach. The deck also includes Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for its ability to close out games quickly. The key strategy is to maintain a fast pace and keep the pressure on the opponent, while using efficient removal to clear the way for attacks.
